description_long: This is a rugged, open-frame tricycle with a sporty, off-road design, featuring a single large front wheel and two oversized rear wheels with deep treads for enhanced traction. The body is primarily olive green with yellow accents, and it has a low, aerodynamic profile. The seating area is open and equipped with a single bucket seat and a visible steering wheel, protected by a sturdy roll cage. The front of the tricycle is streamlined, with a prominent fender over the front wheel and angular headlights. The rear section is robust, with exposed suspension components and no visible cargo basket. The overall construction suggests a vehicle built for both urban and rougher terrain, prioritizing agility and driver visibility.
description: A sporty, open-frame tricycle with large, rugged wheels, olive green and yellow body, and a single bucket seat under a roll cage. Designed for off-road and urban use, it features a streamlined front and exposed rear suspension.
description_view_0: Front view shows the single large front wheel, streamlined fender, and the open cockpit with the roll cage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open frame, bucket seat, steering wheel, and the large rear wheels with deep treads.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two oversized rear wheels, exposed suspension, and the absence of a rear cargo basket.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cockpit, roll cage, and the robust wheel configuration.
